compiled_state.title: Validation logger: format check outcome -> logfile field always 'unknown' in untracked-validation-failures.log
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Incident Overview
untracked-validation-failures.log contains 96+ entries of the form:
  UNTRACKED | format | logfile: unknown
spanning 2026-04-07 through 2026-04-08. The format check is triggering and recording failures, but the logfile field is always 'unknown', suggesting the log path resolution fails when recording format check outcomes.

## Impact
Low — format checks still run and block commits correctly. The logfile tracking failure is cosmetic but causes log bloat and could mask real format failures in the untracked log sweep.

## Steps to Reproduce
Run validate.sh --ci or pre-commit hooks that include the format check. Observe untracked-validation-failures.log after.

## Expected
logfile field should contain the actual Ruff/format check log path.

## Actual
logfile: unknown — log path resolution fails during format check outcome recording.
